text_excerpt: Surgeries and Town Hall Meetings | Richard Fuller MP Skip to main content Main navigation The Economy About News Campaigns Surgeries Policy and Campaign Responses Contact Surgeries and Town Hall Meetings Tweet Richard holds regular advice surgeries for his constituents in North Bedfordshire. If you are not sure if Richard is your MP, please enter your postcode here . Surgeries are an opportunity for constituents to meet with Richard and bring their problems or concerns to his attention. Richard holds three types of surgery: In person, by appointment only Online or by telephone, by appointment only Drop-in, no appointment necessary To book a place at one of Richard’s in person or online/by telephone appointment-only surgeries, please call 01767 317224 or send an email to [email protected] . Please remember to include your full name, address and a contact telephone number and provide a brief outline of the issue you would like to raise with him. If your problem is urgent, Richard will always try to progress your case without an appointment and if you call the number above, Richard’s team is available to help. Please see below a list of Richard's upcoming surgeries: Friday 8 May 3-5pm - Appointment surgery. Great Denham Community Hall, 86 Saxon Way, MK40 4GP. Please call 01767 317224 to arrange an appointment. Friday 14 May 12-2pm - Online/by telephone. Please call 01767 317224 to arrange an appointment. Friday 22 May 12.30-2pm - Drop-in Surgery. Eyeworth Village Hall, High St, Eyeworth, SG19 2HH. No appointment necessary - please come along and share your views. Friday 12 June 3-5pm - Appointment surgery. Sandy Conservative Club, 19 Bedford Rd, Sandy SG19 1EL. Please call 01767 317224 to arrange an appointment. Richard also holds regular "town hall" meetings across the constituency. The next scheduled town hall meetings are set out below. These meetings are open to anyone in the constituency and provide an opportunity in a public forum to hear Richard's views on current issues and to ask him any questions: Thursday 7 May 7.30-9pm - Colmworth Village Hall, Church Road, Colmworth MK44 2JX News Richard held a town hall meeting in Bromham - next one in Colmworth on 7th May Monday, 27 April, 2026 Richard held his last public meeting for residents at Bromham Village Hall. Commenting afterwards he said:It was a fantastic turnout in Bromham for my latest ‘town hall’ meeting. Richard holds a drop-in surgery in Clapham - next one in Blunham on 24th April Wednesday, 15 April, 2026 Richard's last drop-in surgery took place at Clapham Village Hall. His next one is being held at Blunham Village Hall on Friday 24 April from 12.30-1.30pm. Richard holds a town hall meeting in Cardington - next one in Bromham on 16th April Wednesday, 8 April, 2026 Richard's last MP town hall meeting took place at the Village Hall and Reading Rooms in Cardington. Richard held a town hall meeting in Wyboston - next one in Cardington on Thursday 19 March Wednesday, 11 March, 2026 Richard's last 'town hall' meeting was held at Wyboston Village Hall. Richard held a drop-in surgery at Little Staughton - next one in Clapham on Friday 6 March Wednesday, 25 February, 2026 Last month, Richard held his drop-in surgery at Little Staughton Baptist Church.Speaking afterwards he said: I am grateful to those who came to see me at my recent drop-in surgery in Little Staughton.I was also very pleased to be able to sit down with Parish Councillor, Verity Hawkins, who kind Richard held a town hall meeting in Sandy - next one in Wyboston on Thursday 29 January Friday, 23 January, 2026 On Friday evening, Richard held his latest public meeting at Sandy Conservative Club. Richard held a drop-in surgery in Cotton End - next one is taking place in Little Staughton on Friday 30 January Friday, 23 January, 2026 Richard's last drop-in surgery took place at Cotton End Village Hall and his next once is being held from 12.30-2pm on Friday 30 January at Little Staughton Baptist Church.No appoint
